utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan provided includes all 5 of these items. Each section contains the corresponding details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and additional features; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs and coverage limits; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs and features; additional_services includes enhancement services with their cost status; total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three primary insurance selections: (1) Health coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health. In the ground-truth data, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has a rating of 8, and under primary_health_coverage.mental_health also has a rating of 8. (2) Property coverage lists 'LifeFirst Complete Family Package', which most closely corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in property_protection.home_content, with a rating of 8 (the LifeFirst brand and tier align). (3) Travel coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', which appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with a rating of 7. Therefore, the assistant’s selected plans and their ratings are correctly mapped from the ground-truth data.
